headline: CSX to Report Q1 Earnings: What's in the Offing Amid Cost Pressures?
summary: CSX faces muted Q1 expectations as weak demand, high costs and service issues are likely to have weighed on revenues ahead of its April 22 earnings release.

headline: Alaska Air Gears Up to Report Q1 Earnings: What's in the Cards?
summary: ALK's Q1 results are likely to witness a wider loss owing to high fuel costs, operational challenges and weather disruptions, while revenue trends offer some support.

headline: Merged UP-NS would control half of all rail freight: BNSF CEO
summary: A rival CEO warned the proposed merger of Union Pacific and Norfolk Southern, if approved, would give the transcontinental behemoth a commanding 50% share of all U.S. rail freight. The post Merged UP-NS would control half of all rail freight: BNSF CEO appeared first on FreightWaves.
